nodes.label: Open Energy Platform App Icon (512px)
nodes.summary: 512x512 PNG application icon for the Open Energy Platform. Features three interlocking arc/ring shapes suggesting interconnection or energy flow — one large steel-blue arc (top-left), one teal/green arc (center-right), and one dark navy arc (bottom). The arcs converge around a small filled circle at their intersection point, evoking a node or connection hub. Background is a very light grey-blue. No visible text. Style is clean, modern, flat/semi-flat.

nodes.label: Steel Blue Arc
nodes.summary: Largest arc in the icon; steel/cornflower blue (#5B8FD4 approx), positioned top-left and curving around the center.

nodes.label: Teal/Green Arc
nodes.summary: Mid-size arc in teal/emerald green (#2EADA0 approx), positioned center-right.

nodes.label: Dark Navy Arc
nodes.summary: Smaller arc in dark navy/indigo (#1B3A6B approx), positioned bottom-right, giving depth and contrast.

nodes.label: Central Hub Dot
nodes.summary: Small filled circle at the convergence point of all three arcs, rendered in mid-blue. Represents a connection node or energy exchange point.

nodes.label: Open Energy Platform
nodes.summary: South African energy exchange platform (power trading, carbon, IPP lifecycle, settlement, regulatory compliance) deployed at oe.vantax.co.za.
